title: Craftable discs
description: A mod that makes Discs craftable
body:
Craftable Discs 2.0.4

Now you won't have to find a dungeon [misspelled dungeon in the mod description in game] in hopes of finding a disc

2.0.0 Update notes: you'll now have to craft a Empty Disc to actually craft some discs

By crafting this disc, you'll now unlock all the discs recipes

you can make discs out of nothing with the Automatic Disc Crafter

Commands:


/craftableabout - Gives detail about the mod
